description: Triggers when user wants to create new skills, edit existing skills, or verify skills work before deployment
should_trigger: Create a new skill for our n8n workflow automation
Write a SKILL.md for the Odoo integration pattern
Edit this existing skill to add new functionality
Verify that this skill works correctly before deploying
Create evals for my new skill
How should I structure my new skill file?
should_not_trigger: Create a README for my project
Write a blog post about my product
Write unit tests for my TypeScript code
